message:
refactor(security): simplify overlap detection in secret scanner

Replace verbose overlap detection logic with the standard interval
overlap formula: start1 < end2 && start2 < end1

The previous implementation checked three separate conditions:
1. entropy_match.start is inside existing match range
2. entropy_match.end is inside existing match range
3. entropy_match fully contains existing match

This is equivalent to the simpler interval overlap check, which is:
- Two intervals [a,b) and [c,d) overlap iff a < d && c < b

The new code is:
- More readable and follows standard interval arithmetic
- Mathematically equivalent to the original logic
- Easier to verify for correctness

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
